title: PVP Enchantment Tweaks
description: Gives all weapons their own visual enchantment textures based on Sharpness levels, and also includes Protection, Knockback, and Fire Aspect. No mods required.
body:
This Resource Pack gives weapons and armor their own visual distinction.

Unique Sharpness colors

Unique Knockback and Fire Aspect colors

Unique Protection colors

Once you’re familiar with the pack, you’ll be able to tell what enchantment an item has at a glance!

Note: This pack may not be allowed on some PvP servers. Use at your own risk.

Levels:
Level I 💚 Green
Level II 💛 Yellow
Level III 🧡 Orange
Level IV 💖 Red
Level V ❤️ Dark Red
Level VI → X 🩷 Pink
Level 11 → 255 💜 Purple
